description_long: This jewelry store occupies the ground floor of a stately, rectangular commercial building with a white, classical facade. The front features tall, arched windows and doorways framed by ornate pilasters and decorative molding, giving the storefront an elegant and historic appearance. Above the windows, there are rectangular transom windows with warm lighting visible from within, suggesting a welcoming interior. The roof is flat and dark, with no visible ornamentation or rooftop structures. The sides and rear of the building are plain and unadorned, lacking windows or decorative features. The overall impression is of a refined, upscale establishment likely situated in a historic urban district.
description: A stately, white jewelry store with a classical facade, arched windows, and ornate detailing, set in a rectangular commercial building.
description_view_0: The front view shows the ornate white facade with tall arched windows, decorative pilasters, and warmly lit transom windows above the entrances.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the flat, dark roof and the plain, undecorated side wall, with the ornate front just visible at the edge.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a featureless, flat wall and roof, with no windows or decorative elements visible.
description_view_3: This side view again emphasizes the flat roof and plain wall, with a glimpse of the detailed front facade.
